item.title: When you're nice to the weird girl and now you have 2
item.description: After seeing my wife put on her unicorn onesie, my daughter demanded her dragon robe. This is my life. Unicorns and Dragons... And I wouldn't have it any other way

item.title: Just let me die in peace
item.description: I dodged it for 2.5 years, but it finally caught up with me. Yes, I'm vaxxed. The advice from an unvaccinated family friend who just caught it for like the 4th time: take ivermectin or hydroxychloroquin. /facepalm EDIT: This post made Most Viral! ? The irony!

item.dc:creator: Satci

item.title: Seriously. Don't do this.
item.description: Yesterday morning I woke up happily surprised to see that I'd matched online with a woman who I would normally have considered "out of my league". She had even sent a hello message. As far as I can gather, what actually happened was that a friend had got ahold of her phone, and though it would be funny to match her with a guy like me. I don't really know how to explain what it was like when I pieced that together. Don't do this. Edit: For those asking, I'd rather not describe the process of figuring it out. Suffice to say it's not the first time.
item.dc:creator: gratedatasientiste

hemithecomix

item.title: Former postpartum depression sufferer seeking current one.
item.description: I’ve been thinking about it since and can’t remember the user’s name. You posted a gif of Théoden saying “So it begins”. I had postpartum depression and know how hard it is. You may not see this but I really, really hope that you do! This is my advice to you: 1. Talk to someone. You mentioned you were going to therapy today and that’s awesome! Talk about how and what you feel, especially when you’re feeling the worst(this advice is also for anyone with depression). If there’s no one to talk to in those moments, my inbox is open. 2. Take time to take care of YOU. I know that sounds impossible with a newborn. However, it is important! Try at ever opportunity to have some you time and do something you love or need. Go for a walk, take a nap, read, get a pedi, have lunch with a friend, etc. 3. It’ll get better when they start sleeping throughout the night. As I said before, I had postpartum depression and know it is difficult…to say the least. I wish I had more tips or could help you in some way. You are going to be okay ❤️
item.dc:creator: CleverLoserName

item.title: House Democrat blames MGT for homophobic voicemail
item.description: Imgur isn't letting me upload the video directly (which I'm sure will get me in hot water due to the obscene language), so you'll have to give your click/tap to Twitter: https://twitter.com/RepSwalwell/status/1539775755927822337
item.dc:creator: MyCommentsUsuallyHaveTypos

item.title: Catholics are stealing LGBTQ+ books from libraries.
item.description: Christians are checking out all LGBTQ books at libraries as part of a “Hide the Pride” campaign / https://www.lgbtqnation.com/2022/06/christians-checking-lgbtq-books-libraries-part-hide-pride-campaign/
item.dc:creator: BootsDusty

item.title: The meaning of light. In these photos you can see how the building was designed to allow as much light in as possible. Beautiful rays of magic
item.dc:creator: rippinro

item.title: Simplified Paper Enigma for decoding numbers
item.description: I’ve been playing with the Paper Enigma idea, originally created by Michael C. Koss. This is a much more simplified version based on his original Paper Enigma design. I’ve made this numbered version that only has one reflector, one main disk and two key numbers. For this I had to redraw the paths and connect them all around. It works! It’s a fun little puzzle that I would like to make out of better materials one day. This is a lame demonstration of how it works.
item.dc:creator: PaulDeGraaf
